ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case entry */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the cases were reported */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Unique area code for the region */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area or region */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases reported */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* New cases reported on the given date */,
  "cumulative_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of confirmed cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES areas ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the area belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total cases reported in the report */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths reported in the report */,
  "total_vaccines" INTEGER /* Total vaccines administered reported in the report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role in the reporting system (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death entry */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the deaths were reported */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Unique area code for the region */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed deaths reported */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* New deaths reported on the given date */,
  "cumulative_deaths" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of confirmed deaths */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES areas ("area_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination entry */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where vaccinations were administered */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Unique area code for the region */,
  "total_vaccines_administered" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccines administered in the area */,
  "new_vaccines_administered" INTEGER /* New vaccines administered on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES areas ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Area code associated with the trend */,
  "weekly_cases" INTEGER /* Total cases for the week */,
  "weekly_deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths for the week */,
  "week_ending_date" TEXT /* End date of the week for reporting */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES areas ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., report generated, new data available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Area code for the region */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total confirmed cases in the region */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths in the region */,
  "total_vaccines" INTEGER /* Total vaccines administered in the region */,
  "case_rate" REAL /* Case rate per 100,000 population */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate per 100,000 population */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate per 100,000 population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_statistics_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES areas ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Area code where the intervention was implemented */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., lockdown, vaccination campaign) */,
  "intervention_date" TEXT /* Date the intervention was implemented */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES areas ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect entry */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intervention that caused the effect */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Area code where the effect was observed */,
  "effect_date" TEXT /* Date the effect was observed */,
  "cases_before" INTEGER /* Number of cases before the intervention */,
  "cases_after" INTEGER /* Number of cases after the intervention */,
  "effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the intervention (percentage reduction in cases) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_effects_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES areas ("area_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_effects_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization entry */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where hospitalizations were reported */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Unique area code for the region */,
  "total_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalizations reported */,
  "icu_admissions" INTEGER /* Number of ICU admissions reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES areas ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test entry */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where tests were reported */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Unique area code for the region */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests reported */,
  "positive_tests" INTEGER /* Number of positive tests reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES areas ("area_code")
)
